summary: Backend: 12/12 pytest cases PASS (8 regression + 4 new: mood/energy/notes persistence, notes-clear via null, habit category change, dashboard.habit_streaks shape). Frontend: validated new Check-In UX (DateStrip 14 days incl. testID date-{YYYY-MM-DD}; tapping yesterday switches header to 'Backfill'; mood-1..5 toggle/deselect; energy-1..5 cumulative fill with x/5 label; toggle-notes shows TextInput and notes persist after Save -> reload; transient Saved toast appears for ~1.8s; per-habit streak pill (🔥1) shown on Exercise after a same-day check-in). Settings: edit-habit -> change category via chip row -> Save moves habit between groups (verified via API: Health -> Career, group count incremented 3->4); Cancel discards (category remained Health). PWA web manifest fields (themeColor, backgroundColor, display: standalone, shortName, description) present in app.json. No red-screen errors. Only minor non-blocking console warnings.

minor.issue: Still returns 200 stub when no record exists; consistent with prior iteration and frontend handles it. Not a regression.
Dead first-pass best-streak loop (server.py lines ~261-278) still present from previous iteration; recomputed cleanly afterwards. Cosmetic cleanup recommended.

issues: Toast position (top: 64) and pointerEvents='none' correct; auto-hides after ~1.8s — clean.
Mood emoji buttons 52x52 (>44pt), energy bars use flex with adequate hit area.
Edit area chip row scrolls horizontally; selected chip outlined in category color — clear affordance. Cancel/Save buttons grouped right-aligned with adequate spacing.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'Animated: useNativeDriver is not supported because the native animated module is missing. Falling back to JS-based animation.' This is Expo web preview behavior only and harmless on native, but consider passing useNativeDriver:false on web or guarding via Platform.OS. Reference: /app/frontend/src/components/Toast.tsx:19-25.
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents.' Move pointerEvents='none' into the style prop. Reference: /app/frontend/src/components/Toast.tsx:35.

action_items: (Optional) In /app/frontend/src/components/Toast.tsx, move pointerEvents='none' into the View's style prop, and pass useNativeDriver:false on web (Platform.OS === 'web') to silence the warning.
(Optional) Clean up the dead first-pass best-streak loop in /app/backend/server.py (~lines 261-278) — flagged in iteration 1, still present.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: Pydantic models updated with optional mood/energy/notes; upsert correctly merges existing+new via {**existing, **data}; ObjectId excluded via projection — good.
server.py: habit_streaks per-id loop iterates from today (or yesterday) backwards while id appears in completed_habit_ids — correct semantics matching the UI pill.
check-in.tsx: useFocusEffect reloads on date change; setDirty flag drives the 'Saved' subtitle; energy cumulative selection (energy>=v) is intuitive.
settings.tsx: edit chip row uses testIDs in the documented format 'edit-cat-{habitId}-{slug}'. Cancel discards local editingId/editingName/editingCategory without API call — correct.
DateStrip.tsx: Correctly generates 14 days ending today with testID 'date-{YYYY-MM-DD}'; selected and today styles distinct.
Toast.tsx: 1.8s auto-hide + spring-in animation; component returns null when not visible — clean.
app.json: PWA manifest fields present (themeColor #050505, display standalone, shortName 'Life', description, lang en).
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_MoveUI2 habit via API+UI to verify category move (Health->Career) and Cancel (no change). Saved today's check-in with mood=3, energy=4, notes='TEST_E2E_note from playwright' and 1 completed habit (idempotent upsert). All TEST_* data cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression file is /app/backend/tests/test_life_analytics.py (12 cases). Frontend testIDs newly verified: date-strip, date-{YYYY-MM-DD}, mood-{1..5}, energy-{1..5}, toggle-notes, notes-input, toast, edit-cat-{habitId}-{cat-slug}, save-edit-{habitId}, cancel-edit-{habitId}. Two harmless console warnings (pointerEvents deprecated + useNativeDriver on web) originate from Toast.tsx.
rca_of_issue: No P0/P1 issues. The two non-blocking RN warnings are isolated to Toast.tsx on the Expo web preview and can be remediated by (1) moving pointerEvents into style, and (2) gating useNativeDriver behind Platform.OS !== 'web'.
